languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Зарков уведомляет о тяжелой ситуации на планете. Флора и фауна мира словно сошла с ума. А все из-за массового нашествия тварей, которых в сообщении называют... Погонщицами? Не та ли это ксенотварь, с которой вы столкнулись?"

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Зарков уведомляет о тяжелой ситуации на планете. Флора и фауна мира словно сошла с ума. А все из-за массового нашествия тварей, которых в сообщении называют... Погонщицами? Не та ли это ксенотварь, с которой вы столкнулись?"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

"Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

languages.text: 「艦長様！ザルコフが惑星で深刻な事態を報告しています。この惑星の動植物が狂乱状態です。それは、送信機が「ドレーバー」と呼んでいる大量の生物の侵略によるものです。それは、あなたが遭遇した異生物ではありませんか？」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様！ザルコフが惑星で深刻な事態を報告しています。この惑星の動植物が狂乱状態です。それは、送信機が「ドレーバー」と呼んでいる大量の生物の侵略によるものです。それは、あなたが遭遇した異生物ではありませんか？」

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Zarkov informa de una situación grave en el planeta. La flora y la fauna del mundo han enloquecido por una invasión en masa de unas criaturas que la transmisión llama... ¿Pastores? ¿No fue esa la xenobestia a la que se enfrentó allí?».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Zarkov informa de una situación grave en el planeta. La flora y la fauna del mundo han enloquecido por una invasión en masa de unas criaturas que la transmisión llama... ¿Pastores? ¿No fue esa la xenobestia a la que se enfrentó allí?».

languages.text: “舰长大人！扎尔科夫报告行星突发紧急情况，当地动植物已完全陷入狂暴。一切源于一场大规模的生物入侵。报告中称这些生物为……‘拒生花’。这莫非是您之前遭遇过的那种异形怪物？”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！扎尔科夫报告行星突发紧急情况，当地动植物已完全陷入狂暴。一切源于一场大规模的生物入侵。报告中称这些生物为……‘拒生花’。这莫非是您之前遭遇过的那种异形怪物？”

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov meldet eine ernste Situation auf dem Planeten. Flora und Fauna der Welt spielen verrückt. Alles nur wegen der Masseninvasion von Kreaturen, die die Übertragung anlockt ... Treiber? Ist das nicht die Xenobestie, der Ihr begegnet seid?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov meldet eine ernste Situation auf dem Planeten. Flora und Fauna der Welt spielen verrückt. Alles nur wegen der Masseninvasion von Kreaturen, die die Übertragung anlockt ... Treiber? Ist das nicht die Xenobestie, der Ihr begegnet seid?"

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Zarkov, gezegende ciddi bir durum bildiriyor. Dünyanın flora ve faunası çıldırmış. Hepsi iletinin... Çoban olarak adlandırdığı yaratıkların kitlesel istilası yüzünden. Bu karşılaştığınız zenohayvan değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Zarkov, gezegende ciddi bir durum bildiriyor. Dünyanın flora ve faunası çıldırmış. Hepsi iletinin... Çoban olarak adlandırdığı yaratıkların kitlesel istilası yüzünden. Bu karşılaştığınız zenohayvan değil mi?"

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! On nous rapporte une situation critique sur Zarkov. La flore et la faune de la planète se déchaînent en raison d'une invasion massive de créatures que notre contact a appelées... "Chasseurs" ? C'est à cette sorte de xénobête que vous avez eu affaire, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Zarkov is reporting a serious situation on the planet. The flora and fauna of the world have gone mad. All because of a mass invasion of creatures that the transmission calls... Drovers? Isn't that the xenobeast you encountered?"

C'est à cette sorte de xénobête que vous avez eu affaire, n'est-ce pas ? »
